# neon_active_regions (Data Source)

Retrieves the list of active regions available in Neon.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "neon_active_regions" "example" {
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `regions` (Attributes List) The list of active regions. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--regions))

<a id="nestedatt--regions"></a>
### Nested Schema for `regions`

Read-Only:

- `default` (Boolean) Whether this region is used by default in new projects.
- `geo_lat` (String) The geographical latitude (approximate) for the region.
- `geo_long` (String) The geographical longitude (approximate) for the region.
- `name` (String) A short description of the region.
- `region_id` (String) The region ID.
